title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 136.230 - Fees for collection by distress warrant — exceptions
text:
136.230.  Fees for collection by distress warrant — exceptions. — The officer collecting money by virtue of a distress warrant shall receive such fees for paying the same to the director of revenue as are allowed by law to collectors for the same service; provided, that the provisions of this chapter found in sections 136.160 to 136.230 shall not be held or construed to apply to persons as defined and required to collect and remit and pay money to the state under the provisions of the sales tax law.
(L. 1945 p. 1428 § 32)
